# Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have described the change and the reasoning behind it.
- [ ] I updated or added tests where applicable.
- [ ] I ran `npm run type-check` and fixed any TypeScript errors.
- [ ] Backend changes include updates to Pydantic models when message shapes change.
      -- [ ] For tool changes, I added or updated an example where applicable.

Please include testing steps and any manual verification instructions in the PR description.
